name: Our Little Friend
short_description: Our Little Friend is a short horror game that follows your "Little Robot Friend" and it's completely trustworthy and reliable instructions for some silly and innocent lil' games!
detailed_description:
Our Little Friend is a short horror game that follows your "Little Robot Friend" and it's completely trustworthy and reliable instructions for some silly and innocent lil' games!
Will you be his friend till the end?

This game contains multiple endings and various minigames that your friend suggests. But something seems to be off about it!
Keep an eye out, because who knows what will change in the future?

FEATURES


  • Find and complete different endings!
  • Find yourself in different minigames!
  • Decent Replayability!
  • Unlock more minigames by playing the game!
